_description: Maps version patterns to release codenames. Used by the application at runtime and in build metadata.
_format: Each key is a version string (e.g., '0.5.0') or a minor version prefix (e.g., '0.5'). The value is an object with 'codename' and optionally 'description' and 'milestone'.

0.5.description: Core platform with multi-provider storage, AI extraction, and web UI

0.6.description: Enhanced search, filtering, and improved UI/UX

0.7.description: Workflow automation, custom pipelines, and rule-based processing

0.8.description: AI quality, retrieval, and multi-language foundations

1.0.description: Enterprise-ready with multi-tenancy, RBAC, and horizontal scaling

1.1.description: Collaboration features, document sharing, and analytics

2.0.description: On-premise AI, advanced document management, and platform expansion

3.0.description: Integration hub, agent platform, and interoperability
